seo_description: Current time in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Central Time Zone — CST (UTC-6) in winter, CDT (UTC-5) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Milwaukee, WI.

faq.question: What time is it in Milwaukee right now?
faq.answer: Milwaukee, Wisconsin, USA uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Milwaukee is on the same time as Chicago (just 90 miles south), Minneapolis, St. Louis, and Kansas City — 1 hour behind New York. The live clock above shows the current Milwaukee time.

faq.question: What time zone is Milwaukee in?
faq.answer: Milwaukee, Wisconsin is in the Central Time Zone (CT). It uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) from the first Sunday in November to the second Sunday in March, and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Milwaukee shares its time zone with Chicago, Minneapolis, Dallas, and Houston.

faq.question: Does Milwaukee observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Milwaukee, Wisconsin observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (CST → CDT) and fall back on the first Sunday in November. Wisconsin follows the standard US DST schedule.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Milwaukee and New York?
faq.answer: Milwaukee (CST/CDT, Central Time) is always 1 hour behind New York (EST/EDT, Eastern Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in New York, it is 8:00 AM in Milwaukee.

faq.question: Is Milwaukee in the same time zone as Chicago?
faq.answer: Yes. Milwaukee, Wisconsin and Chicago, Illinois are both in the Central Time Zone (IANA: America/Chicago). They are approximately 90 miles apart and always share the exact same time — CST (UTC-6) in winter and CDT (UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Milwaukee?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Milwaukee are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM CT, Monday through Friday. Milwaukee is Wisconsin's largest city and an industrial and manufacturing hub. Major employers include Johnson Controls, Northwestern Mutual, Kohl's, Harley-Davidson (headquartered nearby in Menomonee Falls), and Miller Brewing (MillerCoors). The Milwaukee Art Museum and RiverWalk entertainment district operate with extended evening hours on weekends.
